name: MapLight Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on improving the lives of patients suffering from debilitating central nervous system, or CNS, disorders. Our lead product candidate, ML-007C-MA, is a fixed-dose combination of an M1/M4 muscarinic agonist, ML-007, co-formulated with a peripherally acting anticholinergic, or PAC, which we are initially developing for the treatment of schizophrenia and Alzheimer's disease psychosis, or ADP.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on improving the lives of patients suffering from debilitating central nervous system, or CNS, disorders.

catalysts.event: ZEPHYR Phase 2 trial for schizophrenia reaches target enrollment of 300 participants
catalysts.sentence: We are conducting ZEPHYR, a Phase 2 trial evaluating ML-007C-MA for the treatment of schizophrenia, and we expect the trial to reach the target enrollment of 300 participants in April 2026 and report topline results in the third quarter of 2026.

We are conducting ZEPHYR, a Phase 2 trial evaluating ML-007C-MA for the treatment of schizophrenia, and we expect the trial to reach the target enrollment of 300 participants in April 2026 and report topline results in the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: VISTA Phase 2 trial for Alzheimer's disease psychosis topline results reported
catalysts.sentence: We are also conducting VISTA, a Phase 2 trial evaluating ML-007C-MA for the treatment of ADP, and expect to report topline results in the second half of 2027.
